info.title: Warplane Control Plane API
info.description: Local REST API for the Interchain Control Plane for Avalanche L1s

post.description: Import artifacts from a local directory

artifactsDir.description: Absolute or relative path to artifacts directory

get.description: List message traces with optional filters

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Filter by source or destination blockchain ID

get.description: Get a single trace by message ID
Get ordered event timeline for a trace
Get the raw stored trace JSON (including all metadata)
List traces with non-success execution status
Search traces, chains, and scenarios by keyword
